body.raw:
{
  "case_id": "RIVIERA-BAY-SMOKE-TEST",
  "documents": [
    {
      "filename": "riviera-bay-facts.txt",
      "content": "SINGAPORE RESIDENTIAL PROPERTY SALE 2024

Seller: Chen Wei
Buyer: Priya Nair
Property: 12 Riviera Bay Drive, Singapore
Purchase Price: SGD 1,850,000

REPRESENTATION 1 — RENTAL INCOME
On 20 May 2024, Chen Wei stated in an email to Priya Nair: 'The property generates $4,800 per month in rental income consistently. This has been the case for the past two years.'
Actual position: Tenancy agreements show rental income of $3,200 per month. Chen Wei held the tenancy agreements at the time of the statement.

REPRESENTATION 2 — MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ARREARS
On 22 May 2024, Chen Wei stated: 'There are no outstanding Management Corporation disputes or arrears in relation to this property.'
Actual position: An MC dispute letter dated 3 March 2024 showed $18,000 in arrears. This letter was in Chen Wei's possession at the time of the statement.

REPRESENTATION 3 — ROOF REPAIRS
On 25 May 2024, Chen Wei stated in the Option to Purchase: 'The roof was fully replaced in 2022 and is under a 10-year warranty.'
Actual position: Inspection report shows only partial repairs were carried out. No warranty document has been located. It is unclear whether Chen Wei knew the repairs were only partial.

The contract was signed on 1 June 2024. Governing law: Singapore.",
      "doc_type": "STATEMENT"
    }
  ]
}
